name: Natural Plastic Food Storage Bag Organizer Yellow - Brightroom™: Freestanding Bag Holder, Kitchen Dispenser, 12.75"x12.75"
description:
Easily access different food storage bags whenever needed with this Bamboo Plastic Food Storage Bag Organizer from Brightroom™. This bamboo organizer is designed with four oblong-shaped slots to stash different size food storage bags. Featuring a natural wood finish, it showcases embossed "Gallon," "Quart," "Sandwich" and "Snack" above each slot for easy identification. Compact in size and featuring a freestanding design, it easily fits inside a kitchen drawer or shelf for effective space utilization.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
